text:
Once upon a time in the little town of Meadows Edge lived a curious cat named Charlie.

Every morning Charlie would jump onto the kitchen table with graceful paws and stretch his ears high. Charlie loved to watch the sun rise casting hues of orange and pink across the sky, thinking it reminded him of yarn.

One morning, Charlie spotted something unusual. Instead of dewdrops, tiny white flowers fluffed out in the grass. He padded closer and sniffed. They smelled lovely! He curled up on his favorite rock by the garden.

Days turned into weeks, and the flowers grew taller. Charlie visited every dawn, nibbling the petals.

One day, a wise old owl flew down. "Greetings," he hooted softly. "Those flowers bloom only once."

Charlie tilted his head. "Do they taste good?"

"No sweet flavor, just fresh freshness."

That night Charlie dreamt of adventures tasting buds far away.

Years passed. The flowers turned golden.

One lazy afternoon, Charlie watched children play
